title: OptiNeo
description: This modpack makes your games feel like OptiFine, but on NeoForge!
body:
Have you ever wanted your favourite mods with OptiFine?
But you couldn't because you used NeoForge?
Well wait no more with OptiNeo!
This modpack adds all available OptiFine features into NeoForge modpack.
So now when you want to play your favourite NeoForge mod, you can use it on this modpack.

## **Features 💎**

**· Shaders Support 🌅**

**· Dynamic Lights 🕯️**

**· Optimization 💪**

**· OptiFine Zoom 🔍**

**· Connected Glass 🪟**
